en: A:May I ask if pae:aeh is at home?
She’s at home, please come in.
A:May I ask if pae:aeh is at home?

ab: siya ’okik ray taew’an, So’o hayza’ kano’ ka howaw?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?
B: Who is it?
A: Grandpa, I’m ’away, please open the door.
B: Who is it?

ab: toway, yako hi ’okay, ya:o mowa:i’ rini ’am makakSiyae’ ki So’on.
en: A:toway, I’m ’okay, I’ve come to play with you.
A: Long time no see.

ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!
B: Please sit down and have some tea.
A: Thank you.
B: Please have some tea.
A: (Exclamation) Your tea is delicious.
B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: ’a:ay! hini boway kita’en kayzaeh si’aelen o.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很好吃。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look delicious.
B: How is the fruit?

ab: ’ihi’, sa’oewaz si’aelen kayzaeh a tomal o.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: ni ’oya’ tinikinSa:o’ kayzaeh ila, wa’ila ta si’ael ila.
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!
A: Okay, I’ll wash my hands first.

ab: pak’akoy ka somi’ael ki rinae’oe:, ’izi’ kaSikar.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: yako somi’ael kin ’akoy Sanbaba:ok a tomal.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.
B: Eat more, don’t be polite.
A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: yako ’am lobih ila, So honasamez ’am mowa:i’ naehan komita’ ’iSo’on.
ch: A:我要離開了，有空再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you again sometime.
B: Okay, see you later.
A: It’s late, I’m going home.
B:Come again next time!
B: Go slow.

ab: ’a:ay, So: honasamez wa:i’ naehan ray taew’an ma’an pakaSiyae’.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
